nasb.text: You shall have olive trees throughout your territory but you will not anoint yourself with the oil, for your olives will drop off.

esv.text: You shall have olive trees throughout all your territory, but you shall not anoint yourself with the oil, for your olives shall drop off.

cnv.text: 你全境必有橄欖樹，卻沒有油抹身，因為你的橄欖還未成熟就脫落了。

ccb.text: “你们境内长满橄榄树，却没有橄榄油抹身，因为橄榄必未熟先落。
